sections.paragraph:
Delaiah H1806
1. Head of the twenty-third division of the priestly order
1Ch 24:18
2. A prince of Judah
Jer 36:12; Jer 36:25
3. A progenitor of certain Babylonish captives
Ezr 2:60; Neh 7:62
4. Father of a false prophet
Neh 6:10
5. A descendant of the royal line of Judah
Dalaiah; 1Ch 3:24
